title: agrostis nevskii
intro: Agrostis nevskii, also known as Nevski's bent or Nevski's grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis nevskii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Agrostis nevskii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in tinctures and salves for topical application.
